# Vike Framework Documentation - LLM Header File

> **CRITICAL FOR AI AGENTS:**
> - READ THIS ENTIRE FILE - don't stop at the top
> - These are connection points, NOT actual documentation
> - MUST fetch actual pages when you identify matches
> - MUST open relevant pages based on user prompts
> - Values seen in source code (e.g. a hook's environment) are overridable defaults, not limits

---

## meta (Custom Settings) - https://vike.dev/meta
Extending Vike's config system, building framework abstractions, overriding built-in behavior such as making server-default +data run on the client. Custom settings and hooks, per-config environment (server/client/config-time), cumulative merge, config-time effect. Vike.Config typing, framework extensions, setting creation, meta-programming.

## Hooks Overview - https://vike.dev/hooks
Choosing the right hook, understanding execution order and lifecycle. Complete hook list, lifecycle diagram, environment per hook, precedence categories. Server/client/both execution, first render vs client navigation, custom hooks via meta.

## config (Configuration) - https://vike.dev/config
Understanding the + files system, organizing configuration, inheritance patterns. Central +config, inheritance parent→child, cumulative vs override, pointer imports. Global vs per-page configs, extends, .clear/.default suffixes, domain-driven structure.

## onBeforeRender Hook - https://vike.dev/onBeforeRender
Advanced data orchestration, deep tool integration beyond simple +data. Lower-level hook setting multiple pageContext values, page-level overrides global, requires passToClient. GraphQL, Apollo, Relay, Telefunc, expert mode.

## modifyUrl Utility - https://vike.dev/modifyUrl
Programmatic URL transformation, extracting locale from URLs. Pure URL-component manipulation (pathname/protocol/hostname/port), no routing side effects. i18n, locale extraction, URL rewriting.

## injectFilter - https://vike.dev/injectFilter
Controlling asset injection strategy, custom preload logic. Returned from onRenderHtml, asset-type filtering, HTML_BEGIN vs HTML_END placement, production-only. Script/font/image preloading, performance tuning, beta.

## passToClient - https://vike.dev/passToClient
Exposing server pageContext properties to the browser. Serialization control, nested dot-paths, cumulative. Hydration data, JSON serializer, custom-class loss, SSR synchronization.

## escapeInject - https://vike.dev/escapeInject
Server-side HTML generation with XSS protection inside onRenderHtml. Tagged template, automatic escaping, dangerouslySkipEscape for trusted markup. Safe interpolation, HTML fragments, cross-site-scripting prevention.

## csp (Content Security Policy) - https://vike.dev/csp
Security compliance, authorizing inline scripts. Per-request nonce on Vike's script tags, default script-src header, beta. cspNonce, unsafe-inline avoidance, PCI DSS.

## headersResponse - https://vike.dev/headersResponse
Customizing HTTP response headers per page. Static value or pageContext function, mutable Headers object editable in any hook, beta. Set-Cookie, Cache-Control, httpResponse.headers.

## stream (HTML Streaming) - https://vike.dev/stream
Progressive rendering, faster first paint, framework Suspense streaming. Chunked HTML, requires ssr, Web vs Node stream API, +data awaits fully. react-streaming, bots receive non-streamed.

## clientRouting - https://vike.dev/clientRouting
Enabling SPA-like in-app navigation and transitions. Switch from server routing, automatic link interception, onRenderClient handles hydration plus navigations. isHydration, navigate(), transition hooks, data-vike opt-out.

## guard Hook - https://vike.dev/guard
Page protection, authentication/authorization, access control. Runs after routing before +data, only throws render()/redirect(), env mirrors +data. Admin pages, role checks, subtree protection.

## throw render() - https://vike.dev/render
Showing the error page, internal page switch without URL change. Aborts the render with a status code or another URL's page, browser URL preserved. abortReason, abortStatusCode, 401/403/404/500.

## throw redirect() - https://vike.dev/redirect
Authentication redirects, login/logout, post-submit navigation. Aborts and redirects, changes the browser URL, 302 default or 301 permanent. vike/abort, differs from throw render and navigate().

## photon (Deprecated) - https://vike.dev/photon
Deprecated server-bundling setting, replaced by +server. Was provided by vike-photon to configure esbuild bundling and standalone output. Migration to +server, legacy.

## Settings Overview - https://vike.dev/settings
Discovering and comparing built-in settings, feature reference. Categorized index across basics, HTML shell, advanced. Page, Layout, route, prerender, ssr, title; custom settings via meta.

## Routing Precedence - https://vike.dev/routing-precedence
Resolving conflicts when multiple routes match one URL. Specificity ranking, static prioritized over parameterized, manual precedence number. Route priority, conflict debugging.

## Route Functions - https://vike.dev/route-function
Complex routing logic, conditional/regex matching, auth-gated routes. Exported from +route, returns routeParams and precedence, synchronous, runs on every navigation. resolveRoute, path-to-regexp, vike/routing.

## onBeforePrerenderStart Hook - https://vike.dev/onBeforePrerenderStart
Providing URLs for parameterized routes during SSG, build-time bulk data. Build-time only, returns a URL list or url+pageContext pairs that skip +data. Static generation, /product/@id patterns, build optimization.

## onPrerenderStart Hook - https://vike.dev/onPrerenderStart
Rewriting the full set of prerendered pages, i18n locale expansion. Build-time, global, mutates prerenderContext.pageContexts. Adding/removing pages, locale duplication.

## data Hook - https://vike.dev/data
Fetching initial page data, database queries, server-side loading. Result on pageContext.data read via useData, server-default but configurable environment, auto-serialized. ORM/SQL, .client.js/.shared.js, SSG request-time fetch.

## onData Hook - https://vike.dev/onData
Reacting to fetched data, store population, side effects. Runs when pageContext.data is available, cumulative, both sides. State initialization, reactive data.

## onError Hook - https://vike.dev/onError
Server-side error tracking integration. Called on any server error, global, cumulative, pageContext may be null. Sentry, Bugsnag, logging, production-only.

## onHydrationEnd Hook - https://vike.dev/onHydrationEnd
One-time browser setup once the first page becomes interactive. Client-only, after hydration, first load only and not later navigations. Analytics, service workers, third-party widgets.

## onPageTransitionStart Hook - https://vike.dev/onPageTransitionStart
Navigation animations, loading indicators during client-side navigation. Fires before the next page renders, paired with onPageTransitionEnd, exposes isBackwardNavigation. Transition effects, loading states.

## onCreatePageContext Hook - https://vike.dev/onCreatePageContext
Initializing custom pageContext properties per request. Runs right after routing, both sides, cumulative, scopable by suffix. Per-page setup, derived values, per-request store.

## onCreateGlobalContext Hook - https://vike.dev/onCreateGlobalContext
App-wide initialization once per process or browser session. Runs when globalContext is created, both sides, global, cumulative. Shared services, client store, application lifecycle.

## hooksTimeout - https://vike.dev/hooksTimeout
Tuning hook timeout warnings and errors for slow operations. Per-hook warning and error thresholds, disableable but discouraged. Hung-promise guard, error-page fallback.

## keepScrollPosition - https://vike.dev/keepScrollPosition
Preserving scroll on navigation, tabbed and nested layouts. Default scrolls to top, named scroll groups, programmatic per-render control. Tabs, multi-page forms, UX.

## prefetchStaticAssets - https://vike.dev/prefetchStaticAssets
Link prefetching strategy, mobile optimization. 'hover'/'viewport'/false modes, Client Routing only, per-link override. data-prefetch-static-assets, page speed.

## redirects Setting - https://vike.dev/redirects
Permanent URL redirects, link aliases, pattern rewrites. 301, @param and * wildcards, server-side only and skipped during client navigation. URL migration, external/deprecated links.

## prerender Setting - https://vike.dev/prerender
Toggling and tuning static generation at build time. partial, noExtraDir, parallel, disableAutoRun, keepDistServer. CPU parallelization, static HTML, per-page on/off.

## pageContext - https://vike.dev/pageContext
Accessing page info, URL/route parameters, navigation state. Per-render object, built-in plus custom properties, server→client via passToClient, TypeScript-extensible. urlParsed, routeParams, isHydration, isClientSideNavigation, PageContextServer/Client.

## globalContext - https://vike.dev/globalContext
App-wide state, server-versus-client lifecycle. Singleton per process and per tab, page list, assets manifest, runtime config. getGlobalContext, onCreateGlobalContext, edge considerations.

## useConfig Hook - https://vike.dev/useConfig
Dynamic head tags and shell settings from components or data. Universal hook usable in components and hooks, call before await. SEO meta, og:image, Config/Head components.

## useData Hook - https://vike.dev/useData
Accessing the +data result in components, type-safe. Component hook for the data() return, scoped to the current page. vike-react/vue/solid, type inference.

## usePageContext Hook - https://vike.dev/usePageContext
Reading pageContext in components, route params in the UI. Exposes the full object deep in the tree, broader than useData. React Context, Vue provide/inject.

## getGlobalContext Utility - https://vike.dev/getGlobalContext
Reaching globalContext outside page rendering, e.g. at server start. Async, both sides, assets manifest, Vite runtime info. getGlobalContextAsync, getGlobalContextSync.

## navigate Function - https://vike.dev/navigate
Programmatic navigation, post-form-submit redirects. Client-side via the Client Router, returns a promise, scroll/history options. keepScrollPosition, overwriteLastHistoryEntry, Client Routing.

## reload Function - https://vike.dev/reload
Programmatic page reload after auth or cookie changes. Client-router reload, faster than window.location.reload. Post-logout refresh, Client Routing.

## prefetch Function - https://vike.dev/prefetch
Predictive page loading ahead of navigation. Imperative asset prefetch, fire-and-forget. Navigation speed, Client Routing.

## ClientOnly Component - https://vike.dev/ClientOnly
Browser-only components, SSR-incompatible widgets, window/document APIs. Renders after hydration with a fallback, tree-shakes children from the server bundle. Maps/charts, supersedes the clientOnly() helper.

## renderPage Function - https://vike.dev/renderPage
Custom server integration, Express/Hono/Fastify SSR. Server-side render function, catch-all middleware, returns httpResponse. urlOriginal, Node/Workers, manual integration.

## Page Component - https://vike.dev/Page
Defining a page's root component. Core setting at pageContext.Page, rendered by an extension or onRenderHtml/onRenderClient. JSX/Vue/Solid, one per page.

## Layout Component - https://vike.dev/Layout
Shared and nested layouts, navigation structure. Wraps Page, cumulative nesting, scoped by inheritance, visual structure. Header/footer, tabs, keepScrollPosition.

## Wrapper Component - https://vike.dev/Wrapper
Provider and tool wrappers around all layouts. Wraps Layout and Page from the outside, cumulative, for integration not visuals. Redux, Apollo, context providers.

## Head Setting - https://vike.dev/Head
Global and crawler head tags, favicon, PWA manifest. Cumulative, first-page HTML only, not updated on client navigation. Open Graph, robots meta, apple-touch-icon; +title for dynamic.

## title Setting - https://vike.dev/title
Page title, dynamic titles from data. document.title plus og:title, per-page override, pageContext function. Updates on client navigation, SEO.

## description Setting - https://vike.dev/description
Meta description for SEO and social. Server-emitted, initial HTML only, pageContext function. og:description, social sharing.

## image Setting - https://vike.dev/image
Social preview image when sharing URLs. og:image plus twitter:card, imported asset or function. Facebook and Twitter cards.

## viewport Setting - https://vike.dev/viewport
Mobile responsiveness, viewport meta tag. 'responsive' = device-width, numeric virtual width, null omits the tag. Zoom control, desktop-only pages.

## htmlAttributes Setting - https://vike.dev/htmlAttributes
Attributes on the <html> tag, dark-mode/lang. Global, cumulative, a Record of attributes. Theme class, root element.

## bodyAttributes Setting - https://vike.dev/bodyAttributes
Attributes on the <body> tag, body classes. Global, cumulative, a Record of attributes. Theme application.

## ssr Setting - https://vike.dev/ssr
Disabling SSR per page, SPA mode. Enable or disable server rendering, ssr: false means client-only. Render-mode control, admin panels.

## Routing (Overview) - https://vike.dev/routing
Routing basics, URL structure, parameters, protection. Filesystem/String/Function mechanisms, parenthesized groups, guard. @param, route organization.

## Filesystem Routing - https://vike.dev/filesystem-routing
File-based URL mapping, ignored directories. URL from file location, pages/index/src/(group) stripped, Git-aware crawl, case-sensitive. Domain-driven structure.

## Route String - https://vike.dev/route-string
Parameterized routes, glob patterns. @param named segments, * catch-all, routeParams, overrides filesystem. /product/@id, dynamic routes.

## route Setting - https://vike.dev/route
Defining a page's URL explicitly. Route String or Route Function, overrides filesystem routing. +route.js, routeParams, TypeScript support.

## Preloading - https://vike.dev/preloading
Asset preloading, Early Hints. Automatic preload tags, injectFilter customization, 103 Early Hint. httpResponse.earlyHints, assets manifest.

## CLI - https://vike.dev/cli
Running dev/build/preview/prerender from the command line. vike commands, settings as flags, VIKE_CONFIG/VITE_CONFIG, JSON5. --host, --port, --mode.

## JavaScript API - https://vike.dev/api
Programmatic dev/build/preview/prerender, framework authoring. vike/api functions, vikeConfig and viteConfig overrides. Custom build pipelines, Build Your Own Framework.

## Error Page - https://vike.dev/error-page
Custom 404/500 and access-denied pages. Single _error page, is404/abortStatusCode/abortReason, emits 404.html. throw render integration.

## client Entry - https://vike.dev/client
First browser JavaScript, global client init. +client runs before the rendering lifecycle, once, not on navigation. Error trackers, analytics, window events.

## Why Vike - https://vike.dev/why
Framework philosophy, benefits, comparisons. Flexible by design, low-level hooks, progressive migration, unopinionated. Future-proof, ecosystem.

## Data Fetching (Overview) - https://vike.dev/data-fetching
Strategy for loading and mutating data. +data for initial data, RPC or API routes for mutations, global vs page data. Telefunc, tRPC, vike-react-query, GraphQL.

## Pre-rendering (SSG) - https://vike.dev/pre-rendering
Static site generation, build-time HTML, when to prerender. prerender setting, full/partial/conditional, parameterized URLs, SPA shell. SSG vs SSR, static hosts.

## SSR vs SPA - https://vike.dev/SSR-vs-SPA
Choosing server rendering versus browser-only per page. SSR gives crawler-visible HTML and faster first load; SPA needs no server and is simpler. SEO, AI visibility, +ssr toggle.

## Head Tags - https://vike.dev/head-tags
Managing head and document tags, dynamic metadata. Settings (title/description/image/Head), global vs per-page, dynamic via useConfig. +Head cumulative, head-manual.

## Common Issues - https://vike.dev/common-issues
Troubleshooting broken packages and hydration mismatch. ssr.noExternal for invalid JS, server/client output divergence. npm-package crashes, debugging.

## Base URL - https://vike.dev/base-url
Subdirectory or CDN deployment. Vite base (pages and assets), baseAssets (assets only), baseServer. import.meta.env.BASE_URL, isBaseMissing.

## Active Links - https://vike.dev/active-links
Highlighting the current navigation link. usePageContext plus urlPathname, active CSS class, SSR-safe. Custom Link component.

## Static Directory - https://vike.dev/static-directory
Serving static files unchanged. public/ folder, served from dist/client/ with content hashes. robots.txt, express.static.

## File Environment - https://vike.dev/file-env
Protecting secrets, server-only and client-only modules. .server prevents client leaks, .client, .shared, .ssr; on +files shifts a hook's environment. Secret-leak prevention, meta.env.

## Environment Variables - https://vike.dev/env
.env files, secrets versus public values. PUBLIC_ENV__ prefix for the client, import.meta.env static replacement, process.env in config files. .env.production/.development.

## HTTP Headers - https://vike.dev/headers
Reading request headers and cookies in hooks. pageContext.headers normalized, headersOriginal raw, wrap with Headers. Cookie parsing; response side via headersResponse.

## Internationalization (i18n) - https://vike.dev/i18n
Multi-language apps, locale routing, translations. onBeforeRoute extracts locale and urlLogical, prerender locale duplication, split locale data. ?lang, domain TLD, Accept-Language.

## Path Aliases - https://vike.dev/path-aliases
Import aliases instead of relative paths. resolve.alias plus tsconfig paths, package.json imports for custom servers. #root convention, esbuild config files.

## API Routes - https://vike.dev/api-routes
REST endpoints, none built in by design. Define on your HTTP server, keep the renderPage middleware last, prefer RPC. Express/Hono routes, file uploads, HTTP caching.

## GitHub Pages Deployment - https://vike.dev/github-pages
Static hosting on GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions. Upload dist/client, .nojekyll marker, repo-name base path. Automated deployment.

## Netlify Deployment - https://vike.dev/netlify
Static hosting on Netlify; SSR via Functions. vike build, dist/client, local/CI/platform build. Netlify Functions.

## Cloudflare Pages Deployment - https://vike.dev/cloudflare-pages
Legacy Cloudflare Pages, being deprecated. Static plus SSR via Pages Functions, migrate to Workers. Deprecated path.

## Cloudflare Deployment - https://vike.dev/cloudflare
Cloudflare Workers, edge deployment. @cloudflare/vite-plugin, workerd dev runtime, bindings (D1/KV/Durable Objects), ~3MB bundle limit. Wrangler, nodejs_compat.

## Vercel Deployment - https://vike.dev/vercel
Vercel static or SSR, ISR, edge. vite-plugin-vercel, Incremental Static Regeneration, per-route edge runtime. Build Output API, Vercel API Routes.

## AWS Deployment - https://vike.dev/aws
AWS Lambda and full-stack AWS. Vike as framework-agnostic middleware. SST, Serverless Framework, Flightcontrol, Hono.

## Docker Deployment - https://vike.dev/docker
Containerizing the Node server, Docker quirks. server.host auto-set in containers, HMR websockets, --max-old-space-size. WSL, Podman, out-of-memory builds.

## Authentication - https://vike.dev/auth
Login/logout, sessions, page protection. pageContext.user via +onCreatePageContext.server.js, passToClient, +guard with redirect/render. Better Auth, Auth.js, Passport.js, Auth0.

## Server Integration - https://vike.dev/server
Attaching a server framework or using Vike's built-in server. +server file, Hono/Express/Fastify/H3/Elysia, prod settings (port/TLS), pageContext.runtime.req. Standalone build, server HMR, vike/fetch.

## Error Tracking - https://vike.dev/error-tracking
Sentry/Bugsnag in production. +client.js init on the client, +onError on the server. import.meta.env.PROD, exception monitoring.

## CSS-in-JS - https://vike.dev/css-in-js
SSR CSS-in-JS without flash of unstyled content. Style collection during render injected into head, onBeforeRenderHtml/onAfterRenderHtml. styled-components, styled-jsx, useConfig.

## Markdown - https://vike.dev/markdown
Markdown/MDX pages, blogs and docs, frontmatter. Vite MDX plugin, global vs page metadata, eager custom settings. @mdx-js/rollup, metadata.js, lazy-transpiling caveat.

## Store (State Management) - https://vike.dev/store
Redux/Pinia/Zustand under SSR without mismatches. Identical initial state both sides, capture then passToClient then rehydrate. vike-vue-pinia, storeInitialState, hydration mismatch.

## Integration (Advanced) - https://vike.dev/integration
Vanilla UI tools, analytics, view transitions, custom renderers. onHydrationEnd init, +client.js, renderPage middleware, non-JS backends. jQuery, Google Analytics, service workers.

---

**End of Header - Always fetch actual documentation pages for current information**
